_lone_inverted_reason: TAKE_PROFIT_MC_PCT is the MC-probability FLOOR below which take-profit arming triggers — raising it tightens risk by arming the take-profit trigger in a wider band. All other suggestible keys are 'raising loosens risk' (they delay or widen exit thresholds).
